judgeReasoning: Information is complete and accurate, but organization makes it hard to act on. Nine topics are presented chronologically rather than by priority or status. An agent couldn't quickly tell: what's actively in progress vs done? What needs immediate attention? The interview prep spans 4 separate topics but isn't unified. Active work (resumeMessage testing, hop decay research follow-up) is buried among completed items. Length (5.7K chars) is reasonable, but structure forces linear reading rather than quick orientation.
